HomePage.title: PRD Generator

questions.identityPlaceholder: Friendly Market — a warm local community marketplace
questions.painPoint: Who is this for, and which pain point will you remove?

1. Random nearby restaurant picks
2. Voting with teammates
3. See ratings and reviews
questions.userJourney: User journey from opening the app to achieving the goal
questions.userJourneyPlaceholder: Open app → pick people and food preference → get suggestions → share via chat
questions.benchmarkPlaceholder: Clean, calm design like a banking app; map interactions like a familiar map app
questions.outOfScope: Features to exclude for this version
questions.outOfScopePlaceholder: No payments yet. Guest mode only.
questions.successMetricsPlaceholder: Count how many times users tap Share after getting a suggestion
questions.extras: Any other specific requirements or wording?
